page.title: Eunomia - Open eBPF systems research and tooling
page.description: Open-source eBPF systems research, userspace runtime tooling, AI-assisted tracing, and runnable Linux observability documentation.
page.intro: Eunomia builds open-source systems software and documentation for eBPF, userspace runtimes, AI-assisted tracing, and agent security research.

recentPosts.title: ACRFence: Preventing Semantic Rollback Attacks in Agent Checkpoint-Restore
recentPosts.description: ACRFence explains semantic rollback attacks in AI agent checkpoint/restore workflows and shows how intent-aware fencing prevents duplicate irreversible actions and revived authority.
